LanguageData.GR_CryoBlast.description: Unleash a cryo blast that erupts in a wave of freezing energy, slowing movement and encasing targets in layers of frost.
LanguageData.GR_CryoBlast.label: cryo cannon
LanguageData.GR_Disintegrator.description: Fire a focused beam of energy that destabilizes matter at the molecular level, disintegrating flesh, armor, and cover in a flash of searing light.
LanguageData.GR_Disintegrator.label: disintegrator
LanguageData.GR_Distortion.description: Warp space around the target, creating a distortion that disrupts movement and fractures reality in a chaotic burst.
LanguageData.GR_Distortion.label: spatial distortion
LanguageData.GR_FireSpit.description: Spit a glob of volatile chemfuel that sticks to surfaces and ignites on impact, engulfing the area in explosive flames.
LanguageData.GR_FireSpit.label: chemfuel spit
LanguageData.GR_FlameBreathAnimated.description: Exhale a cone of superheated flame that ignites flammable objects and scorches anything caught in its path.
LanguageData.GR_FlameBreathAnimated.label: flame breath
LanguageData.GR_HairballProjectile.description: Spit a glob of blinding fluid that bursts on impact, releasing a flash of caustic light that disorients and obscures vision.
LanguageData.GR_HairballProjectile.label: blinding spit
LanguageData.GR_IncendiaryMote.description: Unleash a torrent of ignited chemfuel in a wide arc, engulfing enemies in roaring flames and leaving a trail of burning destruction.
LanguageData.GR_IncendiaryMote.label: chemfuel flamethrower
LanguageData.GR_Laser.description: Unleash a burst of twin-coiled laser beams that spiral together, cutting through targets with intense, synchronized precision.
LanguageData.GR_Laser.label: twin-coiled laser
LanguageData.GR_PlasmaBurst.description: Release a concentrated burst of superheated plasma that vaporizes armor and scorches everything in its path.
LanguageData.GR_PlasmaBurst.label: plasma burst
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBlast.description: Detonate a toxic projectile that releases a burst of poisonous gas, contaminating the area and weakening all who inhale it.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBlast.label: poison blast
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBreathAnimated.description: Exhale a noxious cloud of poison that lingers in the air, seeping into lungs and weakening all caught within its reach.
LanguageData.GR_PoisonBreathAnimated.label: poison breath
LanguageData.GR_Proj_ThrownSac.description: Hurl a volatile explosive sac that bursts on impact, unleashing a fiery blast and scattering shrapnel in all directions.
LanguageData.GR_Proj_ThrownSac.label: explosive sac
LanguageData.GR_RazorProjectile.description: Launch a bladed, detachable tail in a deadly arc, striking from range with razor-sharp precision before being reconstructed again.
LanguageData.GR_RazorProjectile.label: razor tail
LanguageData.GR_SmokeBomb.description: Fire a large smoke-filled projectile that bursts on impact, releasing a thick cloud that obscures vision and disrupts targeting.
LanguageData.GR_SmokeBomb.label: smoke cannon
LanguageData.GR_SniperFlechette.description: Fire a high-velocity flechette with pinpoint accuracy, designed to pierce armor and strike vital organs from extreme range.
LanguageData.GR_SniperFlechette.label: sniper flechette
LanguageData.GR_StunBolt.description: Fire a crackling stun bolt that overloads nervous systems on impact, temporarily paralyzing targets with a jolt of energy.
LanguageData.GR_StunBolt.label: stun bolt
LanguageData.GR_Warhead.description: Fire a massive anti-grain warhead that delivers a catastrophic explosion, obliterating everything in its blast radius with overwhelming force.
LanguageData.GR_Warhead.label: antigrain artillery
LanguageData.GR_Web.description: Throw a web of sticky silk that can stun its target.
LanguageData.GR_Web.label: web
